title: hydranthelium repens
intro: Hydranthelium repens, also known as creeping hydranthelium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant is native to tropical and subtropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hydranthelium repens include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, and it is also used as a natural remedy for wounds and burns. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
